title: CGLMP
description: Schema for the CGLMP-d Bell-inequality benchmark on d-level qudits encoded in qubits. Supported d in {2, 4}.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'CGLMP' for this schema.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

d.description: Qudit dimension. Must be 2 or 4 (binary encoding). d=2 recovers CHSH; d=4 uses 2 qubits per party.

qubits.description: Distinct physical qubit indices: the first log2(d) are Alice's register, the remaining log2(d) are Bob's. Length must be 2*log2(d).
